name: In Dragon's Wake
description: Early main quest route from Borderwatch/Melve toward Vernworth.
notes: Used to structure the route from Borderwatch to Vernworth.

name: Monster Culling
description: Early Brant quest that can overlap with clearing Trevo Mine.
notes: Optional synergy only; do not force into fast route unless player accepts it.

name: Seat of the Sovran
description: Early Vernworth story step that opens the city/hub context.
notes: Used as prerequisite context for Vocation Frustration.

name: Vocation Frustration
description: Vernworth Vocation Guild quest for unlocking Warrior and Sorcerer through weapon recovery.
notes: Primary quest for first OP power spike.
